title: senegalia palawanensis
intro: Senegalia palawanensis, also known as the Palawan tree or Palawan mimosa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a small tree with a broad, spreading canopy and is native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Senegalia palawanensis is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and it is also used as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
